title: Top 10 Nursing College in Bangalore | Nursing Admission in Bangalore
description: Looking for top-notch BSc and MSc Nursing admissions in Bangalore? Look no further! Bethel Medical Mission offers comprehensive training for aspiring nurses.

Bethel Medical Services, established in 1997 by a group of medical professionals including doctors and paramedical staffs is an organization, which caters to all aspects of medical care, including emergency, preventive, curative and rehabilitative services. It consists of a qualified and eminent team co-ordinated by Prof. Pr. Dr. Sunny D Founder & President of Bethel Medical Mission Hospital & Group of Institutions. The organization ensures complete well being of the population by giving importance to timely diagnosis and preventive health care in the form of regular medical camps and vaccinations. 3 acres of Campus. 200 Bedded Parent Hospital Experienced & Highly qualified staffs Library facility with 5000 books 4000 seated indoor auditorium About Us Why Chose Us Our Featured Courses Recognized by Govt. of Karnataka, Affiliated to RGUHS, INC, KNC, IAP, KSDNEB.
